title: Golden Brown German Prune Skewers
description: A rich and adventurous German dish featuring prunes, this recipe is low-fat-friendly and perfect for a snack or dessert. The air-fry method gives the prunes a crispy exterior while keeping the inside soft and aerated.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the almond flour, egg whites, honey, lemon zest, cinnamon, and salt.
Add the prunes to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the mixture.
Thread the prunes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each prune.
Brush the melted butter onto the prunes.
Cook the prune skewers in the air fryer for 5 minutes, shaking halfway through.
Increase the air fryer temperature to 400 degrees Fahrenheit and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
